title: Document misclassification classification and evaluation triage in the public web app
description:
## Summary
Document the misclassification-classification feature in the public-facing web app documentation.

## Deliverables
- Document the four categories and what they mean operationally.
- Document how operators should interpret the overall breakdown and evaluation-level red flags.
- Document how this classification layer relates to optimization RCA and how it differs from the feedback contradictions report.
- Ensure the documentation ships in the public web app documentation section.
